finding: The Odds API does NOT cover cycling. Only mainstream sports (football/basketball/tennis/etc). Confirmed by checking their sports list page.
Betfair API has cycling as event type 11. Python library betfairlightweight supports listing markets, getting odds, and streaming. Authentication via SSL certs + app key.
Betfair Exchange has active cycling markets: Tour Winner (1.231543034), Points Classification (1.231543037), Top 10 (1.215564080), Stage Winners (per-stage).
Betfair API access is free for development (delayed key, 1-180s delay). Live key costs £499. Delayed key sufficient for pre-race snapshot collection.
OpticOdds, OddsJam, and similar aggregator APIs do not list cycling in their sports coverage.
Open-source Oddschecker scraper exists. Uses requests+BeautifulSoup. URL pattern: oddschecker.com/cycling/tour-de-france/winner. Extracts odds from 20+ bookmakers into DataFrame.
Oddschecker now requires Selenium (JS-rendered). BeautifulSoup alone no longer works. Site layout changes frequently to discourage scraping.
